parents.subject: LU-4883 lmv: disable sub-stripe access from .lustre/fid

commit.subject: LU-4850 lod: get nlink of striped directory
commit.message:
LU-4850 lod: get nlink of striped directory

Since MDD api also relies on the nlink , so LOD needs
to merge nlink/size/xtime from all stripe when do getattr.

Add some tests for open and unlink of striped directory.

Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic6edb83706657876a8e748bc33b507462eddc893
